C.MITCHELL, JUDGE; M.HOLMES, CSR; G.ESPINOCILLA, CLERK. 9:15 AM COURT RECONVENES. ALL PARTIES, 12 JURURS & 2 ALTER- NATES PRESENT. JURY INSTRUCTIONS. CLOSING ARGUMENTS BY BOTH PARTIES. REBUTTAL ARGUMENT. BAILIFF SWORN. JURY RETIRES FOR DELIBERATION. JURY REACHED A VERDICT WHICH IS READ INTO THE RECORD. JURY POLLED AT PLTF'S REQUEST. VERDICT IN FAVOR OF DEFT. OTHER TERMS ON THE RECORD. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MCCARTNEY, JOHN THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 2010 PALOU, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. $1,846.30 RENT, $497.50 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,343.80, LEASE FORFEITED, COSTS PURSUANT TO A MEMO OF COSTS.
